identity.name: Cyrano (Virginia Gay, gender-flipped)
identity.address: Yonge & Bloor / CAA Theatre (651 Yonge St)

narrative.summary: North American premiere. Virginia Gay's queer gender-flipped rom-com reimagining of Cyrano de Bergerac. Financial Times called it 'dazzlingly clever.' March 14–April 5. A modern classic, rewritten with edge. Worth a focused stop when John is mapping the next design-conscious neighborhood run.
